description_long: This is a charming two-story pizzeria with a yellow stucco exterior and a terracotta-tiled roof, evoking a Mediterranean or classic Italian style. The front features a green-and-white striped awning above the main entrance, with a balcony adorned with potted plants and a small table. The side of the building displays a prominent sign reading 'PIZZERIA de' FIGLIOLE' and an outdoor seating area with round tables and chairs shaded by umbrellas. A blue three-wheeled vehicle is parked beside the building, and several potted plants and crates are scattered around the perimeter, adding to the lively street-side ambiance. The rear of the building has laundry hanging from a window and a staircase leading to the upper floor, suggesting residential or staff quarters above. A tall chimney rises from the roof, indicating the presence of a traditional pizza oven inside.
description: A vibrant yellow, two-story pizzeria with a terracotta roof, striped awnings, outdoor seating, and classic Italian architectural details. The building features a prominent sign, balcony, chimney, and lively street-side decor.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entrance, balcony with plants, striped awning, and some crates and a chair near the door.
description_view_1: Rear view reveals laundry hanging from a window, a staircase to the upper floor, and more potted plants and crates.
description_view_2: Side view highlights the pizzeria sign, outdoor tables and chairs, striped awning, and the blue vehicle parked nearby.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the staircase, additional potted plants, the blue vehicle, and a window with green shutters.
